calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-01-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, CSR: Susan Lee, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Petitioner: Ogen Lhamo Tsepal present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Ogen Lhamo Nathan
Decree signed in open court.
